# Implementation Readiness Checklist: WhatsApp Agent Interface

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality across WhatsApp integration, security boundaries, settings API, frontend UX, and deployment before implementation begins
**Created**: 2026-05-20
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md) | [plan.md](../plan.md) | [tasks.md](../tasks.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command. Items test whether requirements are well-written — not whether the implementation works.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are webhook GET verification and POST message-delivery requirements both documented with expected HTTP status codes? [Completeness, Spec §US3, Contract §GET/POST]
- [ ] CHK002 Are all five WhatsApp credential environment variables and their mount prerequisites explicitly listed? [Completeness, Spec §FR-009, Spec §FR-010]
- [ ] CHK003 Are requirements defined for the global settings singleton lifecycle (lazy creation, default values, persistence)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-016, Key Entities §WhatsApp Settings]
- [ ] CHK004 Are allowlist CRUD operations (add, remove, duplicate handling) fully specified in requirements? [Completeness, Spec §FR-015, Contract §POST/DELETE allowlist]
- [ ] CHK005 Are per-phone session scoping, history depth, and `/new` reset semantics documented? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006]
- [ ] CHK006 Are frontend navigation requirements defined for all three routes (Home, Chat, Profile)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-019, Spec §FR-020]
- [ ] CHK007 Are structured logging requirements specified for inbound, outbound, gate, and retry events? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, Contract §Logging]
- [ ] CHK008 Are deployment prerequisites (HTTPS callback URL, migration, env sync) documented in requirements? [Completeness, Spec §Constitution Deployment, Plan §Phase D]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK009 Is the webhook path unambiguously defined as `/whatsapp/webhook` with full callback URL format? [Clarity, Spec §FR-001, Clarifications Session 6]
- [ ] CHK010 Is "10 prior exchanges" defined with measurable boundaries (what counts as one exchange)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005, Clarifications]
- [ ] CHK011 Is E.164 phone number format defined with a concrete example for allowlist validation? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases, Contract §POST allowlist]
- [ ] CHK012 Is the "processing..." acknowledgment text and trigger condition explicitly specified? [Clarity, Spec §FR-011, Clarifications Session 1]
- [ ] CHK013 Is "silent ignore" behavior for non-allowlisted numbers defined with all three constraints (no response, no outbound call, no leakage)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-017, Clarifications Session 2]
- [ ] CHK014 Is the opt-in mount condition enumerated with the exact required vs optional env vars? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010, Contract §Environment Variables]
- [ ] CHK015 Is "friendly error message" for agent failures described with enough specificity to avoid silent failures? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007, Spec §US1 Scenario 3]
- [ ] CHK016 Is the Profile page layout hierarchy (user info above WhatsApp settings) explicitly ordered? [Clarity, Spec §FR-014, Spec §US5]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK017 Do webhook auth requirements align between JWT exclusion and HMAC validation without conflicting protection layers? [Consistency, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-002, Constitution §Auth0]
- [ ] CHK018 Are allowlist empty-state semantics consistent between spec FR-017, user story US5, and webhook contract gate logic? [Consistency, Spec §FR-017, Contract §Pre-processing gate]
- [ ] CHK019 Do settings API authorization requirements match existing chat API scope (`access:api`) without per-user ownership conflicts? [Consistency, Spec §FR-018, Contract §Authorization]
- [ ] CHK020 Are retry backoff intervals (2s, 4s, 8s) and attempt count (3×) consistent across spec, edge cases, and contracts? [Consistency, Spec §FR-013, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK021 Do session storage requirements align between Agno adapter usage and channel isolation from REST `ChatSession`? [Consistency, Spec §FR-012, Constitution §Data and Vector Search]
- [ ] CHK022 Are disabled-state requirements consistent for webhook processing vs in-flight message completion? [Consistency, Spec §FR-016, Spec §Edge Cases]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK023 Can SC-001 (60-second response) be objectively measured without implementation-specific tooling? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK024 Is SC-002 (90% parity with REST agent) defined with a verifiable comparison methodology? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002, Gap]
- [ ] CHK025 Can SC-005 (100% invalid signature rejection) be verified with explicit preconditions (`WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET` configured)? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005, Spec §US3]
- [ ] CHK026 Are user story independent test descriptions sufficient to validate each story in isolation? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §US1–US6 Independent Test]
- [ ] CHK027 Does SC-006 define regression scope for the existing REST/SSE chat API beyond "continues to function"? [Measurability, Spec §SC-006, Gap]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK028 Are primary message flow requirements complete from inbound webhook through agent reply to outbound delivery? [Coverage, Spec §US1, Spec §FR-003, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK029 Are alternate flow requirements defined for multi-turn contextual conversation within a session? [Coverage, Spec §US2]
- [ ] CHK030 Are exception flow requirements defined for agent errors, timeouts, and Meta API unreachability? [Coverage, Spec §FR-007, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK031 Are recovery requirements defined for expired/revoked WhatsApp access tokens? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Gap]
- [ ] CHK032 Are concurrent message handling requirements defined for the same user during in-flight processing? [Coverage, Spec §FR-011, Clarifications Session 1]
- [ ] CHK033 Are settings management flow requirements defined from Profile UI through backend API to runtime gate enforcement? [Coverage, Spec §US5, Spec §FR-014–FR-018]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK034 Are requirements defined for empty or whitespace-only inbound messages? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK035 Are requirements defined for context window overflow beyond the 10-exchange limit? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK036 Are requirements defined for toggling WhatsApp off while a message is in-flight? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK037 Are requirements defined for invalid phone number input on the Profile allowlist? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases, Contract §400]
- [ ] CHK038 Are requirements defined for duplicate phone numbers in the allowlist? [Edge Case, Contract §409, Gap in Spec §FR-015]
- [ ] CHK039 Are media message types (images, video, audio, documents) explicitly excluded from v1 scope? [Boundary, Spec §Assumptions]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK040 Are security requirements defined for dev-only signature bypass (`WHATSAPP_SKIP_SIGNATURE_VALIDATION`) with default-false constraint? [Security, Spec §FR-009, Clarifications Session 5]
- [ ] CHK041 Are data protection requirements documented for phone numbers at rest (encryption deferred) with explicit v1 scope? [Security, Spec §Assumptions, Clarifications Session 1]
- [ ] CHK042 Are observability requirements sufficient to debug gate decisions without exposing secrets? [Observability, Contract §Logging]
- [ ] CHK043 Are performance/degradation requirements defined when agent processing exceeds the 60-second timeout? [NFR, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK044 Are accessibility or responsive layout requirements specified for the new Profile page and sidebar? [Gap, Spec §FR-014, Spec §FR-019]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK045 Is the assumption that the existing search agent requires no modification validated against reuse requirements? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Constitution §Agent Behavior]
- [ ] CHK046 Are Meta Developer account and WhatsApp Business API setup explicitly scoped as out-of-band dependencies? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK047 Is the ngrok/tunneling requirement for local webhook development documented? [Dependency, Spec §Assumptions, Plan §Target Platform]
- [ ] CHK048 Are Agno-managed session table creation requirements documented if auto-DDL differs from app migrations? [Assumption, Plan §Risk & Mitigation]
- [ ] CHK049 Is the email-in-session dependency for Profile page user info identified and addressed in plan risks? [Dependency, Plan §Risk & Mitigation]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK050 Is the term "global singleton" settings model unambiguous regarding who may modify settings (any `access:api` user)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-018, Clarifications Session 2]
- [ ] CHK051 Are long agent reply handling requirements defined for WhatsApp message length limits? [Gap, Plan §Risk & Mitigation]
- [ ] CHK052 Do plan.md artifact statuses (e.g., tasks.md "Pending") conflict with actual generated artifacts? [Conflict, Plan §Generated Artifacts vs tasks.md existence]
- [ ] CHK053 Is phone number masking/redaction in logs specified or intentionally left to implementation? [Ambiguity, Contract §Logging]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Complements [requirements.md](./requirements.md) (spec authoring quality from `/speckit.specify`)
- Focus: WhatsApp integration + security/auth boundaries + Profile/settings UX + deployment
- Depth: Standard | Audience: PR reviewer | Defaults applied (no `$ARGUMENTS` provided)
